## 2.2.2.A. PI #1

### What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?

skeyes is monitoring the performance by using the SES dashboards, even though there is limited room for improvement within Belgian airspace; skeyes contributing to improvements of en-route flight efficiency by establishing a CIV-MIL AMC, co-located at skeyes premises, which aims at optimising the airspace management between CIV and MIL and contestant improvements of FUA on local level.
